introSection: Vol d'Icare is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Vol d'Icare opened to the public in 1994.

The ride was retracked during the 2016-2017 off-season.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Pale red track and creme supports.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Vol d'Icare is French for Flight of Icarus.

fullText:
Vol d'Icare is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

Vol d'Icare opened to the public in 1994.

The ride was retracked during the 2016-2017 off-season.



Pale red track and creme supports.



Vol d'Icare is French for Flight of Icarus.
